Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $63,075,011Details
International Box Office $54,654,607
Worldwide Box Office $117,729,618
Domestic Physical Disc Sales

Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,669,470
Total $15,566,625
Further financial details...

Legs:1.92 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:53.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 30th, 2010 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: May 27th, 2010 (Wide) (New Zealand)
